phase_gate.reason: This closes focused BodySource execution for two real BMF-grammar.bml string helper bodies. Full BML thesis parity remains open: generic expression/member/index/call lowering, for-loop execution, switch/select dispatch, complete BMF grammar body semantics, and whole companion-corpus native execution are still required.
